summary: Cybersecurity Analyst (CompTIA Security+) specializing in Defensive Operations and Vulnerability Management. Demonstrated capability through hands-on projects to engineer Python-based security tooling for OSINT and malware analysis. Ready to leverage strong technical foundations in log analysis, threat detection, and risk prioritization within a fast-paced environment.

bullets: Developed a data-driven web application using HTML, JavaScript, and backend databases to process and manage user inputs.
Engineered automated data extraction and reporting functionalities, generating structured PDF and Excel outputs for administrative use.
Configured automated email notification pipelines, gaining practical exposure to web application architecture, data flow, and backend integration.

projects.title: Singularity
projects.subtitle: Malware Analysis & Threat Detection Utility
projects.description: A Python-based utility for automated static malware analysis, extracting specific IOCs to accelerate initial threat triage.
bullets: Engineered a Python-based utility for automated static malware analysis, extracting specific IOCs (Hashes, PE Headers) to accelerate initial threat triage.
Streamlined the static analysis process by generating structured threat signatures, significantly reducing the manual effort required to investigate suspicious artifacts.

projects.title: ArchInt
projects.subtitle: Threat Intelligence & OSINT Aggregator
projects.description: An automated Python OSINT tool integrating VirusTotal and Shodan APIs to aggregate and structure public threat intelligence.
bullets: Developed an automated Python OSINT tool integrating VirusTotal and Shodan APIs to aggregate and structure public threat intelligence.
Parsed and formatted raw indicators into structured datasets (e.g., JSON/CSV), providing direct and readable context to support proactive threat hunting.

projects.title: InfraFix
projects.subtitle: IaC Security Validator & Configuration Auditor
projects.description: A Python utility to automatically parse and validate Infrastructure as Code (IaC) configuration files against established security baselines.
bullets: Developed a Python utility to automatically parse and validate Infrastructure as Code (IaC) configuration files against established security baselines.
Designed the tool to proactively identify common misconfigurations and access control flaws, demonstrating a practical approach to preventative vulnerability management.
